newsSince: Major positive fundamental shift. WDC's entire calendar-2026 HDD production is sold out, with firm POs from its top seven customers and multi-year long-term agreements extending into 2027 (two customers) and 2028 (one). Cloud is ~89% of revenue. Margins at records (FQ3'26 non-GAAP GM ~50.5%, FQ4 guide 51-52%, rev guide $3.65B ~40% YoY) on undersupply pricing. A wave of analyst PT hikes ($610-685; MS/JPM ~$650) and Computex 2026 AI-storage positioning drove the +30% move since June 9.

sources.label: MLQ: 2026 HDD sold out, record results

verdicts.rankRationale: Residual-alpha lens: sold-out 2026 HDD capacity, multi-year LTAs to 2028 and record margins are a real fundamental step-change, not just tape. Even as a 'monitor/benchmark' name farther from the passive/power core, the supply-tightness signal merits an up nudge on news, separate from the crowding/YTD penalty applied elsewhere.
verdicts.bull: Entire 2026 HDD output sold out, LTAs into 2028, record ~50%+ margins on undersupply pricing — a durable structural up-cycle.
verdicts.neutral: Powerful storage-cycle catalyst but WDC sits outside the passive/power bottleneck stack this page targets.
verdicts.bear: +259% YTD and $232B cap leave it crowded; storage is cyclical and farther from the page's core lens.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sold-out 2026 HDD capacity + multi-year LTAs into 2028
verdicts.primaryRisk: Cyclical storage pricing reversal; crowded post-rerating

verdicts.rankRationale: Master-list lens: data-layer/AI-storage thesis materially strengthened — 2026 sold out, LTAs to 2028, record margins and a broad analyst PT-hike wave. Fundamental confirmation supports an up move on the under-owned-bottleneck list, independent of the YTD-rerating penalty.
verdicts.bull: AI data-gravity translating into sold-out capacity, multi-year contracted demand and record margins — strongest storage backdrop in years.
verdicts.neutral: Clear AI-storage demand confirmation, but a $232B mega-cap is no longer under-owned.
verdicts.bear: Mega-cap and +259% YTD make it a late, crowded expression of the storage bottleneck.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sold-out 2026 HDD + multi-year LTAs; record margins
verdicts.primaryRisk: Storage cyclicality and crowded mega-cap positioning
